artifacts.coverLetterNote: Tight note connecting field deployment, ambiguous customer data, and production ownership.

conversations.notes: Confirmed remote US, customer-facing expectation, and lower-than-target posted base range. Proceeded because scope is strong and offer includes equity.

draft.subject: Re: Aperture Science offer
draft.body:
Hi,

Thank you again for the offer and for the time the team spent walking me through the Enrichment Center deployment work. I'm excited about the scope and the chance to own customer outcomes end to end.

Given the role's field ownership, technical ambiguity, and production responsibility, I would be comfortable moving forward if we can bring the base closer to the top of the discussed range while keeping the rest of the package intact.

Best,
Jane

draft.subject: Re: Principal Engineer offer
draft.body:
Hi,

Thank you for the offer and for such a thoughtful process. The scope is compelling, especially the platform migration work.

Before I can make a final call, I wanted to ask whether the team can support a remote-first arrangement with planned visits for key planning and launch moments. That would make the opportunity much easier to compare seriously.

Best,
Jane
